text:
世の中、わかってないアークスが
まだまだ多いと思うんですよお。

ベリーハードは難しいとか疲れるとか
ぜんっぜんわかっていません。
あんなにやりがいがあるのに。

ベリーハードで撃って撃って撃って
殺って殺って殺りまくるのが
アークスの醍醐味ですよねえ？

さ、わかる者同士で仲良く
クリアしまし

There are still lots of ARKS out there who
really just don't seem to get it.

How could anyone look at the joys of Very
Hard quests and say they're too tough or too
demanding? What do they even live for?

Isn't heading out on Very Hard quests and
shooting the life out of baddie after baddie
the whole point of being part of ARKS?

I'm glad at least you understand.
Let's go out and clear one together!
